# three.ws — Complete Page Index

three.ws is the AI-agent layer for the open web: build, embed, monetize, and trade autonomous agents with real 3D avatars, on-chain identity (ERC-8004), pay-per-call (x402), and pump.fun token launches.

Canonical site: https://three.ws
Tagline: Give your AI a body.
Source code: https://github.com/nirholas/three.ws
Contact / social: https://x.com/trythreews

This file is generated from data/pages.json. It lists every public surface on the site, grouped by section, so AI agents and crawlers can navigate without scraping the home page.

## Main

Entry points into the product.

### Home

URL: https://three.ws/

Landing page. Pitch, live agent demos, and the front door to every flow.

### Discover

URL: https://three.ws/discover

On-chain agent directory (ERC-8004 + Solana). Browse, search, and inspect every registered agent.

### Avatar Gallery

URL: https://three.ws/gallery

Every public 3D avatar in the system, browsable as a grid.

### Marketplace

URL: https://three.ws/marketplace

Buy access to agents, skills, and avatars from other creators.

### Community

URL: https://three.ws/community

Featured creators, builds, and conversations from the three.ws community.

### Sitemap

URL: https://three.ws/sitemap

Human-readable index of every page on three.ws.

## Build

Create and customize an agent.

### Create Agent

URL: https://three.ws/create

Wizard for building a new agent: avatar, brain (LLM + prompt), skills, and on-chain identity.

### Viewer

URL: https://three.ws/app

Drag-and-drop glTF/GLB viewer for inspecting 3D models in the browser.

### glTF Validator

URL: https://three.ws/validation

Khronos-spec validator for glTF/GLB files. Paste a URL or upload a model.

### Widget Studio

URL: https://three.ws/studio

Pick an avatar, configure embed options, copy a one-line snippet for your site.

### Artifact Viewer

URL: https://three.ws/artifact

Renders Claude artifact bundles as standalone embeddable apps.

### Widgets Gallery

URL: https://three.ws/widgets

Pre-built chat, voice, and 3D-avatar widgets you can drop into any page.

### Hydrate

URL: https://three.ws/hydrate

Take an existing on-chain agent (ERC-8004 / Solana) and attach a 3D body, voice, and skills.

## Crypto

On-chain features: pay-per-call, token launches, vanity wallets.

### Pay (x402)

URL: https://three.ws/pay

Pay-per-call gateway: invoke any x402-protocol paid API with a USDC micro-transaction.

### Pump.fun Stream

URL: https://three.ws/pumpfun

Mint and trade pump.fun agent tokens on Solana. Live feed of every launch.

### Pump Live

URL: https://three.ws/pump-live

Real-time SSE feed of every pump.fun launch as it happens.

### Pump Dashboard

URL: https://three.ws/pump-dashboard

Pump.fun trading desk: watchlists, scanner, quotes, portfolio, and live charts.

### Strategy Lab

URL: https://three.ws/strategy-lab

Build DCA and subscription strategies that trade on-chain on your behalf.

### Solana Vanity Wallet

URL: https://three.ws/vanity-wallet

Grind a Solana address with a custom prefix using your browser's GPU.

### ETH Vanity (CREATE2)

URL: https://three.ws/eth-vanity

Grind a vanity smart-contract address using the ThreeWSFactory CREATE2 deployer on BSC.

## Agent Tools

Manage, talk to, and deploy individual agents.

### Chat

URL: https://three.ws/chat

Talk to your agent. Voice, text, and tool-use in one interface.

### Agent Home

URL: https://three.ws/agent

Default landing for an agent instance — chat, embed, and remix actions.

### Agents Index

URL: https://three.ws/agents

Browse every registered agent on three.ws.

### My Agents

URL: https://three.ws/my-agents
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Your private collection of agents and avatars. Requires sign-in.

### Reputation Explorer

URL: https://three.ws/reputation

Inspect on-chain reputation scores and attestations for any agent.

## Account

Sign-in, dashboard, billing.

### Sign in

URL: https://three.ws/login

Sign in with email, GitHub, or a connected wallet.

### Create account

URL: https://three.ws/register

Create a new three.ws account.

### Forgot password

URL: https://three.ws/forgot-password

Request a password-reset email.

### Dashboard

URL: https://three.ws/dashboard
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Your account dashboard: agents, avatars, payments, keys, MCP servers, monetization, billing.

### Dashboard · Wallets

URL: https://three.ws/dashboard/wallets
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Manage connected and agent-managed wallets.

### Dashboard · Usage

URL: https://three.ws/dashboard/usage
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

API call volume, x402 spend, and per-agent usage breakdowns.

### Dashboard · Storage

URL: https://three.ws/dashboard/storage
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Avatar storage modes (R2 vs IPFS) and pin management.

### Dashboard · Sessions

URL: https://three.ws/dashboard/sessions
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Active sign-in sessions across devices.

### Dashboard · Actions

URL: https://three.ws/dashboard/actions
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Agent action history and approvals.

### Settings

URL: https://three.ws/settings
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Account, profile, and notification settings.

## Learn

Docs, tutorials, and reference.

### Docs

URL: https://three.ws/docs

Full documentation: SDKs, API reference, embedding, agent system, smart contracts.

### Docs · Quick Start

URL: https://three.ws/docs/quick-start

Five-minute walkthrough: create an agent, embed it, get a paid call.

### Docs · Agent System

URL: https://three.ws/docs/agent-system

How agents, avatars, skills, and memories fit together.

### Docs · ERC-8004

URL: https://three.ws/docs/erc8004

Reference for the on-chain agent identity standard.

### Docs · Embedding

URL: https://three.ws/docs/embedding

Embed an agent via iframe, oEmbed, or the <agent-3d> web component.

### Docs · <agent-3d>

URL: https://three.ws/docs/web-component

Reference for the <agent-3d> custom element.

### Docs · MCP

URL: https://three.ws/docs/mcp

Expose your agent as an MCP server for Claude, ChatGPT, and other clients.

### Docs · Skills

URL: https://three.ws/docs/skills

Write, package, and monetize agent skills.

### Docs · Widgets

URL: https://three.ws/docs/widgets

Build and publish reusable chat and 3D widgets.

### Docs · API Reference

URL: https://three.ws/docs/api-reference

Full HTTP API reference.

### Docs · SDK

URL: https://three.ws/docs/sdk

JavaScript / Node SDK for three.ws.

### Tutorials

URL: https://three.ws/tutorials

Step-by-step build guides.

## Legal

### Privacy Policy

URL: https://three.ws/legal/privacy

How three.ws handles user data.

### Terms of Use

URL: https://three.ws/legal/tos

Terms of service for three.ws.

## Machine-readable

Indexes and well-known files for crawlers and AI agents.

### sitemap.xml

URL: https://three.ws/sitemap.xml
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

XML sitemap for search-engine crawlers.

### llms.txt

URL: https://three.ws/llms.txt
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

AI-agent-friendly index of every public page (Howard convention).

### llms-full.txt

URL: https://three.ws/llms-full.txt
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Expanded llms.txt with full descriptions and content hints.

### robots.txt

URL: https://three.ws/robots.txt
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Crawler directives.

### OpenAPI

URL: https://three.ws/openapi.json
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Machine-readable HTTP API spec.

### .well-known/x402

URL: https://three.ws/.well-known/x402
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

x402 paid-API discovery document.

### .well-known/agent-attestation-schemas

URL: https://three.ws/.well-known/agent-attestation-schemas
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

JSON schemas for agent attestations.

### .well-known/oauth-authorization-server

URL: https://three.ws/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

OAuth 2.1 authorization-server metadata.

### .well-known/chat-plugin.json

URL: https://three.ws/.well-known/chat-plugin.json
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

ChatGPT-style plugin manifest.
